login.title: Sign in
login.cardDescription: Use your work account to continue.
login.invalidError: The email or password is incorrect.

events.title: Events
events.description: Create, assign, and review attendance events from the admin workspace.
events.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

createEvent.title: Create event
createEvent.description: Define the location, schedule, assigned employees, and fixed recheck slots.
createEvent.employeeIdsTemporary: Employee lookup is not available yet. Enter employee user IDs manually for now.
createEvent.noSlotsDescription: Add slots only when this event requires scheduled rechecks.

sections.assignmentsDescription: Assign employees by their user IDs until employee search is available.
sections.basicsDescription: Set the event name, location, coordinates, and allowed radius.
sections.rechecksDescription: Fixed slots must sit inside the event start and end time.
sections.scheduleDescription: Choose the active event window and attendance requirements.

map.currentLocationUnavailable: Current location could not be detected. Choose a point on the map.
map.currentLocationUnsupported: This browser does not support current location.
map.defaultHint: Default center is Amman, Jordan. Click the map to select the event location.
map.description: Click the map or use your current location. The selected position fills the coordinates below.
map.searchError: Location search failed. Try again or click the map.
map.searchRequired: Enter a location to search for.
map.selectedLocation: Selected location is shown with the radius circle.
map.title: Pick location on map

help.coordinates: Coordinates are filled from the map and can be edited manually if needed.
help.employeeIds: Paste IDs separated by commas, spaces, or new lines.
help.requireCheckout: Employees must submit checkout before leaving.
help.requirePhoto: Photo upload is not configured yet, but the backend can require a photo URL later.

validation.employeeIds: Add at least one employee ID.
validation.endsAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.radius: Radius must be a whole number greater than zero.
validation.slotsInvalid: Fix recheck slots that are outside the event window before submitting.

backendErrors.INVALID_EMPLOYEES: One or more employee IDs do not belong to employee users.
backendErrors.INVALID_JSON: Create event request was not valid JSON.
backendErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: Sign in again before creating an event.
backendErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted event data was not accepted.

errors.unknownSubmitError: Event could not be created. Try again.

events.title: My events
events.description: Assigned active and upcoming events appear in this mobile workspace.
events.emptyDescription: Active and upcoming assignments will appear here.
events.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

eventDetails.title: Event details
eventDetails.description: Review your assignment, planned rechecks, and required actions.
eventDetails.rechecksDescription: These recheck times were defined by the admin.
eventDetails.noRechecksDescription: This event does not have fixed recheck slots.
instructions: Arrive at the event location before checking in.
Keep location access enabled while you are attending.
Submit active rechecks from the app when they become available.
Check out before leaving if checkout is required.
eventDetails.errorTitle: Event details could not be loaded
eventDetails.errorDescription: Refresh the page or return to your events list.

checkIn.title: Check in
checkIn.description: Capture a fresh GPS location, review accuracy, and submit your attendance.
checkIn.emptyLocation: Capture your current location before reviewing GPS accuracy.
checkIn.rechecksDescription: These recheck times were defined by the admin.
checkIn.noRechecksDescription: This event does not have fixed recheck slots.
checkIn.detailsErrorTitle: Event details could not be loaded
checkIn.detailsErrorDescription: Refresh the page or return to your event details.

steps.locationDescription: Use your browser GPS with high accuracy enabled.
steps.reviewDescription: Confirm the captured coordinates, accuracy, and timestamp.
steps.photoDescription: Photo proof is only available after an upload provider is configured.
steps.submitDescription: Send this GPS proof to the secure check-in endpoint.

photo.notConfiguredOptional: Photo upload is not configured yet. This event does not require photo proof, so you can continue without it.

warnings.alreadyCheckedIn: This assignment is already checked in or is no longer eligible for check-in.
warnings.eventNotActive: Event is not active for check-in right now.
warnings.locationRequired: Capture your current location before submitting.
warnings.photoUploadNotConfigured: Photo upload is not configured yet.
warnings.poorAccuracy: GPS accuracy is poor. The backend may mark this proof as suspicious or reject it.

locationErrors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Location permission was denied. Allow location access in your browser and try again.
locationErrors.POSITION_UNAVAILABLE: Location is unavailable. Check GPS, Wi-Fi, or mobile location services and try again.
locationErrors.TIMEOUT: Location capture timed out. Move near a window or open area and try again.
locationErrors.UNSUPPORTED: This browser does not support geolocation.
locationErrors.UNKNOWN: Location could not be captured. Try again.

backendErrors.DEVICE_NOT_TRUSTED: This device is not trusted yet. Ask an admin to approve it before checking in.
backendErrors.EVENT_NOT_OPEN_FOR_CHECK_IN: Event is not active for check-in right now.
backendErrors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to check in.
backendErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: Sign in again before checking in.
backendErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted check-in data was not accepted.

errors.deviceUnavailable: Device ID could not be prepared in this browser.
errors.missingLocationOrDevice: Location and device ID are required before check-in.
errors.unknownSubmitError: Check-in could not be submitted. Try again.

result.acceptedDescription: Attendance has started for this event.
result.rejectedDescription: The proof was recorded, but attendance did not start.
result.suspiciousDescription: Attendance has started, but this proof needs review.
result.title: Check-in submitted

checkOut.title: Check out
checkOut.description: Confirm your event status, capture a fresh GPS location, and submit checkout before leaving.
checkOut.emptyLocation: Capture your current location before reviewing GPS accuracy.
checkOut.rechecksDescription: These recheck times were defined by the admin.
checkOut.noRechecksDescription: This event does not have fixed recheck slots.
checkOut.detailsErrorTitle: Event details could not be loaded
checkOut.detailsErrorDescription: Refresh the page or return to your event details.

steps.confirmDescription: Review your assignment status, event location, and checkout requirement.
steps.locationDescription: Use your browser GPS with high accuracy enabled.
steps.reviewDescription: Confirm the captured coordinates, accuracy, and timestamp.
steps.photoDescription: Photo proof is only available after an upload provider is configured.
steps.submitDescription: Send this GPS proof to the secure checkout endpoint.

photo.notConfiguredOptional: Photo upload is not configured yet. This event does not require photo proof, so you can continue without it.

warnings.alreadyCheckedOut: This assignment is already checked out.
warnings.checkoutNotRequired: Checkout is not required or is disabled for this event.
warnings.eventNotActive: Event is not active for checkout right now.
warnings.locationRequired: Capture your current location before submitting.
warnings.notCheckedIn: You must check in before checking out.
warnings.photoUploadNotConfigured: Photo upload is not configured yet.
warnings.poorAccuracy: GPS accuracy is poor. The backend may mark this proof as suspicious or reject it.
warnings.untrustedDevice: This device is not trusted yet. Ask an admin to approve it before checking out.

locationErrors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Location permission was denied. Allow location access in your browser and try again.
locationErrors.POSITION_UNAVAILABLE: Location is unavailable. Check GPS, Wi-Fi, or mobile location services and try again.
locationErrors.TIMEOUT: Location capture timed out. Move near a window or open area and try again.
locationErrors.UNSUPPORTED: This browser does not support geolocation.
locationErrors.UNKNOWN: Location could not be captured. Try again.

backendErrors.ASSIGNMENT_NOT_IN_PROGRESS: This assignment is not eligible for checkout.
backendErrors.CHECKOUT_NOT_ALLOWED: Checkout is not required for this event.
backendErrors.CHECK_IN_REQUIRED: You must check in before checking out.
backendErrors.DEVICE_NOT_TRUSTED: This device is not trusted yet. Ask an admin to approve it before checking out.
backendErrors.EVENT_NOT_OPEN_FOR_CHECK_OUT: Event is not active for checkout right now.
backendErrors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to check out.
backendErrors.INVALID_JSON: Checkout request was not valid JSON.
backendErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: Sign in again before checking out.
backendErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted checkout data was not accepted.

errors.deviceUnavailable: Device ID could not be prepared in this browser.
errors.missingLocationOrDevice: Location and device ID are required before checkout.
errors.unknownSubmitError: Checkout could not be submitted. Try again.

result.acceptedDescription: Checkout was accepted and this assignment is complete.
result.rejectedDescription: The checkout proof was recorded, but the assignment did not complete.
result.suspiciousDescription: Checkout was submitted and needs review.
result.title: Checkout submitted

recheck.title: Submit recheck
recheck.description: Confirm the active recheck with a fresh GPS location and device proof.
recheck.emptyLocation: Capture your current location before reviewing GPS accuracy.
recheck.detailsErrorTitle: Recheck details could not be loaded
recheck.detailsErrorDescription: Refresh the page or return to your event details.

steps.confirmDescription: Review the event, location, and current recheck window.

steps.reviewDescription: Confirm the captured coordinates, accuracy, and timestamp.
steps.photoDescription: Photo proof is only available after an upload provider is configured.
steps.submitDescription: Send this GPS proof to the secure recheck endpoint.

photo.notConfiguredOptional: Photo upload is not configured yet. This event does not require photo proof, so you can continue without it.

warnings.alreadySubmitted: This recheck has already been submitted.
warnings.assignmentNotInProgress: You must be checked in before submitting a recheck.

warnings.noRecheck: There is no planned recheck available for this event.
